svg.text: AWS Source Architecture — HxPR Platform (terraform-aws-hxpr-environment + tf-cfg-hxpr-infrastructure)
AWS VPC (us-east-1 / eu-central-1) — Multi-AZ Public + Private Subnets
Amazon EKS Cluster (terraform-aws-modules/eks v20.36.0 · m5.xlarge · Bottlerocket x86_64 · ON_DEMAND · min 3 / max 25 nodes)
tika · imagemagick · libreoffice · misc · docfilters · docmerge · aio — [Not provisioned in this IaC scope]
DB creds · SQS ARNs · KMS key refs
EKS Managed Node Group (Bottlerocket AMI · ON_DEMAND)
Instance: m5.xlarge (4 vCPU / 16 GB RAM) · EBS gp3: 4 GB OS + 30 GB data
Amazon SQS (21 Standard Queues · KMS CMK)
Database flow (Pods → MongoDB Atlas via PrivateLink)
Observability flow (Pods → Datadog Agent → Datadog SaaS)
Dashed border = Not found in IaC (KEDA, Network Policies)
